prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ Hybrid Turbo System** for the **CGWB 4.0L TFSI V8** (stock engine code), featuring **Garrett GTX4271R Gen II** turbos with billet compressor wheels, 62mm turbine wheels, and 1.06 A/R housings, supporting **750+ HP** on E85 with a **Weistec 1000cc port injection kit** and **Bosch Motorsport 0261002047** high-flow fuel pumps

Install a **034 Motorsport Stage 3+ Engine Mount Kit** with **034 Motorsport Solid Density Engine Mount Inserts** (P/N: 034-504-1005-S) to eliminate torque steer under **1,000 Nm+** of boosted power, paired with a **034 Motorsport Transmission Mount Insert (P/N: 034-504-1006-S)** for the **ZF 8HP70** 8-speed auto

Replace the stock **CGWB 4.0L TFSI** intercoolers with **AWE Track Edition Front Mount Intercoolers (P/N: 1710-1100)** featuring **5.5" thick cores** and **6061-T6 aluminum end tanks**, reducing intake temps by **40°C** under full load, paired with a **Forge Motorsport Dual-Pass Charge Pipe Kit (P/N: FMICP04D4)** in **3.5" diameter** with **V-band clamps**
estetica: Fit a **Prior Design PD8XX Widebody Kit** (D4-specific) with **carbon fiber fenders**, **custom 3-piece side skirts**, and a **rear diffuser** to accommodate **20x11" ET25** front and **21x12" ET30** rear wheels (staggered) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (285/30/20 & 325/25/21)

Install a **Vorsteiner V-FF107 Forged Carbon Fiber Front Lip Spoiler** (D4-specific) with **OEM+ paint-matched** lower valance, paired with a **Rieger Tuning RS6-Style Rear Bumper** featuring **integrated dual 4" exhaust cutouts** for **Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium Exhaust (P/N: AUD-CGW-04T)**

Replace all exterior trim with **3D Design Japan Carbon Fiber Mirror Covers (P/N: 3D-1001-CF)**, **carbon fiber side markers**, and **Vossen CVT Forged Monoblock CV3-R wheels** in **Brushed Titanium** finish (20x11" ET25 front, 21x12" ET30 rear) with **H&R TRAK+ Sport Springs (P/N: 29165-1)** for a **30mm drop**
